title: Fix a missing phx-submit on a form
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/subscribe_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.SubscribeLive). Render a <.form for={@form} phx-change="validate" phx-submit="save"> containing an <.input field={@form[:email]} type="email" label="Email" /> and a submit button. Add handle_event("save", _params, socket) that returns {:noreply, put_flash(socket, :info, "Subscribed")}. mount/3 builds @form from to_form(%{"email" => ""}).
tier_rationale: Canonical phx-change + phx-submit wiring. Known idiom.
